actions.subject: GearPaw First Settlement — 1 Month Overdue
actions.preview: hi roby, to confirm, HIGGS has 3 games live with us now... GearPaw (live for about 1 month now but yet to settle) - can you confirm when we can get 1st settlement out ASAP?
actions.summary: GearPaw has been live over a month with no settlement sent. Nic is also asking about a $196.76 gap between HIGGS dashboard total ($14,359.21) and what they received ($14,162.45) — Roby suggested bank fees but Nic wants confirmation.
actions.draft:
Hey Nic, will get the GearPaw first settlement out today covering Apr–May. On the $196.76 gap — I said it was likely international bank fees and I'll get confirmation from our end and send across. Will update shortly.

Roby

actions.subject: Anthropic Ramp Card — Needs Payoff
actions.preview: I'm just going to put the big Anthropic bill on my Ramp card, north of $25k. Once it lands, can you pay it off fairly soon so the card's free again?
actions.summary: Marty paid 13 overdue Anthropic invoices out of his own Ramp card (~$25k) and has a new large Anthropic bill landing too. He uploaded all receipts. Needs the card paid off so he has headroom for other expenses.
actions.draft:
Hey Marty, thanks for handling all of that — I'll get the card paid off today. Can you send me the total so I clear it in full? And happy to take the receipts however's easiest for you.

Roby

actions.subject: Stock Option in Pulley + Choice Bank ACH Confirmation
actions.preview: Stock option - awesome! Thanks. Does that just reflect in Pulley later? Choice Bank: I printed the confirmation and it say ACH.
actions.summary: Bryan is asking (1) whether the $12k wire for his stock option exercise will show up in Pulley, and (2) confirming Choice Bank ACH details are same as the April 13 filing ($6,718.75). He cancelled the Brico 3yr projections task himself.
actions.draft:
Hey Bryan, yes — the stock option exercise should reflect in Pulley once processed, usually a day or two. And confirmed on Choice Bank — same ACH details as the April 13 filing.

Roby
